text:
In a quiet village surrounded by misty forests, there lived an old fox named Orion. Orion loved collecting colorful stones he found along lonely trails. One foggy day, while hunting deeper into woods than usual, he stumbled upon a strange circle of stones.

Intent on collecting more prized specimens, Orion plucked stones till he thought he'd madness. Just then, a small owl hooted softly.

With surprise, Orion turned toward the owl. It whispered ancient secrets. Orion listened. The owl spoke of stones that could heal anything. One relic felt heavy in his paw.

With cautious awe, Orion kept it. Late nights reading books filled with old magic seemed like echoes from his prize.

Friends soon knew. They laughed tales.

One moonlit evening, Orion tossed the stone hard.

It fell deep. They knew.

Orion learned to heal things. Trees grew.

But he missed stones.

So...each night he'd gather. Moonlight lingered.

Then one day a cat.

Her fur
